judge_reason: Description B adds specific visual details (clipping header, subheaders, date) that Description A omits, but neither contradicts the other's claims about the visual content present.
original_image_tags: A single, aged, off-white archival page with punch holes at the top. Affixed vertically near the center is a rectangular newspaper clipping with handwritten annotations. At the bottom right, there are handwritten and stamped archival markings.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single pasted newspaper clipping titled “COUNTY IRRITANT” with handwritten date “7/12/47 Thursday,” showing columns of text under headings “Coming His Way” and “Garbles,” on a plain document page with punched binder holes and a stamped “ENCLOSURE” and FBI-style file marking at lower right.*
